name: 4man
description: A four-role dev crew — Planner, parallel Coders & Testers, and a fan-out Reviewer — that builds and reviews features in the requestor's own style. Auto-engages during feature development via the '4man' skill; also exposes /4man:code-review. Hands off through gitignored .pipeline/ files; works on your current branch, or raises a PR when shipping a new feature to an already-hosted repo.
